To: J. Park
From: PC
Subject: Re: CCB Minutes Draft

Hi J,

Thanks for sharing! I had a quick look and I think you have done a really thorough job. The minutes capture the conversation well and I can see you have put a lot of effort into them.

A couple of small thoughts:

- The narrative style is nice and gives readers a sense of what happened in the room. I think that is a strength.
- F. Demir's comments about the team growing — I think you can leave that in. It gives a positive tone and the team will appreciate the recognition.
- The TBDs are fine — we can resolve them in the next CCB or via email if needed.
- The actions look reasonable to me. The "someone will follow up with R. Singh" is a bit vague but the team will know who picks it up.
- 5 days is a bit late but not a big deal — the team is busy and these things happen. I would not worry about it.
- The distribution list looks right to me. We can always forward to others later if needed.

For sending: I think you can send today. It is great work for your first solo set of CCB minutes! I would just leverage clear stakeholder communication going forward to maintain good engagement with the team.

If anyone pushes back on anything we can revise and reissue.

Best,
PC
